memoryArtifacts.headline: The old Puslinch manor no longer stands. This house was built in the mid-1900s by James Yonge, spouse of Mary Upton, a Mohun descendant.

sourceList.title: The Manor of Puslinch, in Devon

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Mohun於1293年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親John de Mohun IV24歲，母親Ada de Tibetot21歲。他於1309年5月與Christiane de Segrave結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年在英國享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Mohun于1293年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲John de Mohun IV24岁，母亲Ada de Tibetot21岁。他于1309年5月与Christiane de Segrave结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年在英国享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Mohun was born in 1293, in Cornwall, England, his father, John de Mohun IV, was 24 and his mother, Ada de Tibetot, was 21. He married Christiane de Segrave in May 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1326, in England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Mohun est né en 1293, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John de Mohun IV, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ada de Tibetot, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Christiane de Segrave en mai 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1326, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Mohun 1293 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Mohun IV 24 und seine Mutter Ada de Tibetot 21. Er hat im Mai 1309 Christiane de Segrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1326 im Alter von 33 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun è nato il nel 1293 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, John de Mohun IV, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Ada de Tibetot, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Christiane de Segrave nel maggio 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1326, nel England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Mohunが1293年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父John de Mohun IVは24歳，母Ada de Tibetotは21歳であった。1309年5月にChristiane de Segraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年にイギリスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mohun(이)가 1293년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Mohun IV(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Tibetot(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1309년 5월 Christiane de Segrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 영국에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun nasceu em 1293, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Mohun IV, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Tibetot, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiane de Segrave em maio de 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1326, em Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Mohun родился в 1293 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Mohun IV было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ada de Tibetot, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiane de Segrave май 1309 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1326 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Mohun nació en 1293, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Mohun IV, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Ada de Tibetot, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Christiane de Segrave en mayo de 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1326, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
